stories.title: The Spurs bounce back in Game 3! Biggest takeaways...
stories.summary: NBA insiders break down Game 3 of the NBA Finals and look ahead to the rest of the Knicks-Spurs showdown.

stories.title: Spurs stun Knicks in MSG to revive Finals hopes
stories.summary: Victor Wembanyama had 32 points, eight rebounds and six assists in his first NBA Finals win as the Spurs cut the series lead to 2-1.

stories.title: 'Sad day': Coaches, ADs stunned by Sorsby ruling
stories.summary: A judge's decision to rule Texas Tech's Brendan Sorsby eligible Monday drew the ire of college coaches and athletic directors, with reactions ranging from doomsday predictions to informal talk about Big 12 schools attempting to not play the Red Raiders.

stories.title: Trump first sitting president to attend NBA Finals...
stories.summary: Donald Trump arrived at MSG before Game 3 of the NBA Finals, becoming the first sitting U.S. president to attend a game in the basketball league's championship series.

stories.title: Aiyuk appears to imply 49ers 'scared' to cut him
stories.summary: Brandon Aiyuk posted a video to Instagram on Sunday, appearing to imply that the 49ers are afraid to release him because he could land elsewhere and eventually make them regret letting him go.
